reason: Verified that agent QA-20260421-164033-ne55 responds correctly to a math question, returning "4" for 2+2
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing three agents
Clicked on agent "QA-20260421-164033-ne55" in the sidebar — Agent page opened, showing agent details and message input field
Verified agent status — Status displayed as "idle" in the top right corner, meeting requirement of "running" or "idle"
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" into the message input field — Message text appeared in input field with send button enabled
Clicked send button to submit the message — Message was sent successfully, agent status changed to "working", new session "Basic Math Question Discussion" was created
Waited for agent response — Agent responded within 2 seconds with message "4" displayed prominently in the chat view
Verified response content — Response clearly shows "4" which is the correct answer to 2+2, with status indicator showing "Worked for 2s"
